shakshi: Hue met the player as an Assassin client — Kore's brother, embedded in the Assassin camp 20 miles west of Castle Azoth
The player accepted Hue's invitation to camp with the Assassins at the western plateau edge
Hue is reporting back to Kore — the invitation was intelligence gathering as much as hospitality
At the western plateau edge at night the pull of the sea became real for the first time — always present, now undeniable
The player reached the western edge of Mt. Hieronymus plateau where the land drops to the sea — 20 miles past Castle Azoth
The desire to go beyond the plateau is now present and named — the seed that 0012 and 0016 grow from
The 0011 gate is open — Depth Meditation perk becomes available when Sophia throws the player overboard in 0016
